message:
feat(storage): tick 140 FTS cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Nineteenth sibling-expansion tick. Adds 4 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the full-text-search index cluster.

New siblings:
- get_indexing_health_with_cx (read path)
- sync_fts_with_cx (read path via spawn_blocking; may mutate index state)
- rebuild_fts_with_cx (read path via spawn_blocking; may mutate index state)
- get_fts_index_state_with_cx (read path)

Each sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` for cancellation
budget honouring, then delegates to the unchanged legacy impl.

Test: `storage_tick140_fts_cluster_roundtrip` drives sync_fts → state
assert → rebuild_fts → indexing_health on a fresh DB. sync_fts and
rebuild_fts route through spawn_blocking and touch fts tables through
the legacy write path, so the cx-first siblings here preserve that
semantic while adding cancellation budget honouring at the boundary.
Verified via fork bypass: 487/487 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 87 + 4 = 91 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 49 legacy methods still lack a sibling; FTS cluster
now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
